assessment: The implementation fully matches the plan scope. Route sync (projectId, phase) is in place and consumed by the WebSocket middleware to set Plan and Sketch unread only when the user is on a different project or phase. Execute unread is driven by blocked task count in the Navbar effect and cleared on view or when blocked count is zero. The phase-unread slice, clearing on view in PlanPhase/SketchPhase/ExecutePhase, Navbar dots with consistent styling and aria-labels, and removal of the Plan success toast are all present. Code quality and test coverage (slice, middleware integration, Navbar, phase tests) are adequate with no obvious gaps or failing scenarios.
